title: Making Change
description: Given the amount of a purchase (1 ≤ P ≤ 99) in cents, determine the way to make "change for a dollar" for that purchase. Use four standard US coin denominations: 1, 5, 10, and 25. The way to make change uses the least number coins.
input: A single line with one integer, P, the amount of the purchase.
output: A single line with four integers telling respectively how many 25 cent, 10 cent, 5 cent, and 1 cent pieces to give as change.
source: Olympiad, USA Computing Olympiad, 1999-2000 Season, USACO Winter 2000 Contest, Orange
